title.en: The Celestial Reliquary of the Abyss

description.ko: 성운 속 특이점의 공포스러우면서도 아름다운 규모에 초점을 맞춘 깊은 우주에 대한 장엄한 시선입니다.
description.en: A majestic look at the deep cosmos, focusing on the terrifying yet beautiful scale of a singularity within a nebula.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-high-definition shot of VOID-3, depicting 'The Celestial Reliquary of the Abyss.' A central black hole singularity is surrounded by a swirling accretion disk of #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo gravitational energy. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds form ghostly silhouettes drifting through the infinite #0D0221 obsidian abyss. Light from distant galaxies is stretched by gravitational lensing. 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, volumetric lighting, capturing the silent majesty of the infinite universe.
